code: import React,{useEffect,useState}from'react';import{supabase}from'../supabaseClient';import{jsx as _jsx,jsxs as _jsxs}from"react/jsx-runtime";const TrendingTicker=()=>{const[items,setItems]=useState([]);useEffect(()=>{const fetchItems=async()=>{const{data}=await supabase.from('proposals').select('title').limit(10);if(data){setItems(data.map(p=>p.title));}else{setItems(["Réforme du mandat présidentiel","Nouvelle constitution inclusive","Décentralisation du pouvoir","Justice pour tous","Élections transparentes"]);}};fetchItems();},[]);const tickerContent=[...items,...items,...items];return/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:"ticker",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("div",{className:"ticker-label",children:"\xC0 LA UNE"}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("div",{className:"ticker-track",children:/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("div",{className:"ticker-content",children:tickerContent.map((item,i)=>/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("span",{className:"ticker-item",children:["\uD83D\uDCE2 ",item]},i))})})]});};export default TrendingTicker;
